dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gapping-Up Doji pattern: (1) Doji body detected via body_pct < 5% (open ≈ close), (2) Lower shadow above prior upper shadow via low > prev_high (creates gap), (3) Upward trend confirmed via close > prev_close. Exit on close below prior day's low (gap fill/reversal). Pattern is directionally LONG in uptrend context.

backtest_rule.reason: Gapping-Up Doji pattern: (1) Doji body detected via body_pct < 5% (open ≈ close), (2) Lower shadow above prior upper shadow via low > prev_high (creates gap), (3) Upward trend confirmed via close > prev_close. Exit on close below prior day's low (gap fill/reversal). Pattern is directionally LONG in uptrend context.

source_rule_text: Gapping-Up Doji: A single candleline that opens and closes at or near the same price (doji), with today's lower shadow remaining above the prior day's upper shadow, creating a price gap on an upward price trend.
